name: source-folder closed-loop step browse lists the source-namespace folders for operator inspection
command: mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/google generated-code-quality-standards/owasp && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/closed-loop-test.sh" --step browse --root generated-code-quality-standards 2>out.txt && grep -q 'namespace=google' out.txt && grep -q 'namespace=owasp' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
